/usr/bin/ar qc libLuxRegni.a Modules/IDMTemplates/CMakeFiles/IDMTemplates.dir/Private/IDMPathRouter.cpp.o Modules/IDMTemplates/CMakeFiles/IDMTemplates.dir/Private/IDMTypes.cpp.o Modules/IDMCore/CMakeFiles/IDMCore.dir/Private/IDMCore.cpp.o Modules/Universe/CMakeFiles/Universe.dir/Private/Universe.cpp.o Modules/World/CMakeFiles/World.dir/Private/World.cpp.o Modules/Region/CMakeFiles/Region.dir/Private/Region.cpp.o Modules/Place/CMakeFiles/Place.dir/Private/Place.cpp.o Modules/Character/CMakeFiles/Character.dir/Private/Character.cpp.o Modules/Object/CMakeFiles/Object.dir/Private/Object.cpp.o Modules/Item/CMakeFiles/Item.dir/Private/Item.cpp.o Modules/Regnum/CMakeFiles/Regnum.dir/Private/Regnum.cpp.o Modules/Regnum/CMakeFiles/Regnum.dir/Private/RegniFactory.cpp.o Modules/Regnum/CMakeFiles/Regnum.dir/Private/Commands/SystemCommandModule.cpp.o Modules/Regnum/CMakeFiles/Regnum.dir/Private/Commands/NavigateCommandModule.cpp.o Modules/RegniByte/CMakeFiles/RegniByte.dir/Private/RegniByte.cpp.o Modules/RegniByte/CMakeFiles/RegniByte.dir/Private/AsciiScene.cpp.o Modules/RegniByte/CMakeFiles/RegniByte.dir/Private/Editors/AsciiTableEditor.cpp.o Modules/RegniByte/CMakeFiles/RegniByte.dir/Private/Render/RaylibPresenter.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libLuxRegni.a
